positive: A vibrant, mystical celestial fox spirit, portrayed in an elegant, stylized neo-art deco silhouette. The fox has an ethereal glow emanating from its tails and ears, set against a deep indigo twilight sky dotted with stylized constellations and swirling nebulae. The fox is depicted mid-leap, maintaining a dramatic, symmetrical pose. Composition should be centered and powerful, using strong contrast between the bright, glowing fox and the deep, velvety background. Color palette emphasizes sapphire blues, glowing turquoise, magenta accents, and deep blacks. The style must be highly vectorized, clean linework, and perfectly suitable for screen printing on apparel. Minimal detail in the background to keep the focus on the subject, ensuring clean edges and graphic appeal. Symmetry is key.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, low quality, dirty, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, fuzzy, jpeg artifacts, monochrome, grainy
